description: This pipeline plots the incoming table as a statistical line category plot and then annotates the data with source slot information. The main steps involve plotting the table, and then annotating the data.

41ac88f1-59d9-4af0-a617-79a09505f2c4.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
41ac88f1-59d9-4af0-a617-79a09505f2c4.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.

af26a828-ebd8-4bc6-8d9e-05bbf7ee07ec.name: plot-table:plot-box-and-whisker
af26a828-ebd8-4bc6-8d9e-05bbf7ee07ec.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Box plot.

8b4cb9dc-6dd0-4a70-b9c7-a227b0efee20.name: annotate-with-source-slot
8b4cb9dc-6dd0-4a70-b9c7-a227b0efee20.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

6cd0a53c-b611-40d7-b56e-8dd7d6b0c1e0.name: annotate-with-source-slot
6cd0a53c-b611-40d7-b56e-8dd7d6b0c1e0.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

13f0cd5c-64b8-4485-ab3b-eb650683fa47.name: plot-table:plot-category-statistical-line
13f0cd5c-64b8-4485-ab3b-eb650683fa47.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Statistical line category plot.

db040415-ba3d-4342-bb8d-6b5fcaea7cf0.name: plot-table:plot-category-statistical-bar
db040415-ba3d-4342-bb8d-6b5fcaea7cf0.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Statistical bar category plot.

72f31be8-e4ae-4922-98a1-16ec12c56f55.name: annotate-with-source-slot
72f31be8-e4ae-4922-98a1-16ec12c56f55.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

fc8ecf29-0eb5-4aca-b420-e03357ce86ed.name: iji-export-image-v2
fc8ecf29-0eb5-4aca-b420-e03357ce86ed.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

3d20b4d7-6f95-4c58-8cd7-78f9dffd1b59.name: plot-table:plot-xy-scatter
3d20b4d7-6f95-4c58-8cd7-78f9dffd1b59.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart XY scatter plot.

a86659bb-90bc-4c3b-abf8-6c2817159084.name: iji-export-image-v2
a86659bb-90bc-4c3b-abf8-6c2817159084.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cf49ddaa-229b-41b5-9360-01b607d1b650.name: plot-table:plot-xy-line
cf49ddaa-229b-41b5-9360-01b607d1b650.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart XY line plot.
